title: Vanguard Renewables Breaks Ground on its First Organics- to- Renewable Gas Facility in Virginia
content: Vanguard Renewables, a portfolio company of Global Infrastructure Partners (GIP), a part of BlackRock, today held a groundbreaking ceremony for its newest renewable natural gas project at The Moyer Familyâ€™s Oakmulgee Dairy Farm in Amelia Court House, VA. The farm, owned by Larkin Moyer, a fourth-generation dairyman, along with his sons Brandon and Jeremy and is the oldest continuously operating family dairy in the Commonwealth.
author: Analysts Account
